## Strategic alignment

LegacyOps Console must remain a CRM modernization platform (CRM core + Siebel-like bridge + anti-corruption layer + migration engine + legacy observability). Does this PR keep that orientation?

- [ ] Yes — does not turn the project into a generic CRM.
